sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 케이던스 디자인 시스템즈는 2025년 14%의 매출 성장과 78억 달러의 기록적인 수주 잔고를 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2025년 연간 매출은 14% 성장했으며, 비일반회계기준(Non-GAAP) 주당순이익은 20% 증가했습니다.
강력한 수주 실적을 바탕으로 2026년 초 기준 78억 달러의 기록적인 수주 잔고를 확보했습니다.

businessChanges.text: AI 기반 제품 포트폴리오에 대한 강력한 고객 수요가 지속되고 있으며, 엔지니어링 소프트웨어의 필수적 가치가 사업 성장을 견인하고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2025년 4분기 매출은 14억 4,000만 달러로 전년 동기 13억 5,600만 달러 대비 증가했습니다.
2026년 연간 매출 가이던스는 59억 달러에서 60억 달러 범위로 제시되었습니다.

watchItems.text: 향후 12개월 내 매출로 인식될 38억 달러 규모의 잔여 수행 의무가 실제 매출로 원활히 전환되는지 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Cadence Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results 14% Revenue Growth and ~45% Non-GAAP Operating Margin for 2025 Record Backlog of $7.8 Billion SAN JOSE, Calif. — February 17, 2026 — Cadence (Nasdaq: CDNS) today announced results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025. Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results • Revenue of $1.440 billion, compared to revenue of $1.356 billion in Q4 2024 • GAAP operating margin of 32.2%, compared to 33.7% in Q4 2024 • Non-GAAP operating margin of 45.8%, compared to 46.0% in Q4 2024 • GAAP diluted net income per share of $1.42, compared to $1.24 in Q4 2024 • Non-GAAP diluted net income per share of $1.99, comp  Normalized numeric aliases: $7.8 Billion = 78억 달러; $1.440 billion = 14억 4,000만 달러; $1.356 billion = 13억 5,600만 달러; $5.297 billion = 52억 9,700만 달러; $4.641 billion = 46억 4,100만 달러; $7.8 = 7.8달러; $1.440 = 1.440달러; $1.356 = 1.356달러; $1.24 = 1.24달러; $1.42 = 1.42달러; $1.99 = 1.99달러; $1.88 = 1.88달러; $5.297 = 5.297달러; $4.641 = 4.641달러.

%, compared to 42.5% in 2024 • GAAP diluted net income per share of $4.06, compared to $3.85 in 2024 • Non-GAAP diluted net income per share of $7.14, compared to $5.97 in 2024 • Year-end backlog was $7.8 billion and revenue expected to be recognized in the next 12 months from remaining performance obligations was $3.8 billion “Cadence delivered excellent results for the fourth quarter, closing an outstanding 2025 with over 14% revenue growth and 20% non-GAAP EPS growth,” said Anirudh Devgan, president and chief executive officer. “Strong customer demand for our expanding AI-driven product portfolio and the essential nature of Cadence's engineering software position us well to capture the massive opportunities in the AI era.” “Cadence closed 2025 with a strong finish and broad-based strength across the business,” said Joh  Normalized numeric aliases: $7.8 billion = 78억 달러; $3.8 billion = 38억 달러; $4.06 = 4.06달러; $3.85 = 3.85달러; $7.14 = 7.14달러; $5.97 = 5.97달러; $7.8 = 7.8달러; $3.8 = 3.8달러.

vered a 44.6% non-GAAP operating margin, reflecting continued productivity-driven profitability improvement. With strong Q4 bookings, we began 2026 with a record backlog of $7.8 billion and excellent momentum.” CFO Commentary Commentary on the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025 financial results by John Wall, senior vice president and chief financial officer, is available at www.cadence.com/cadence/investor_relations. Business Outlook Cadence's outlook does not include the impact of its pending acquisition of Hexagon's design and engineering business. For fiscal year 2026, the company expects: • Revenue in the range of $5.9 billion to $6.0 billion • GAAP operating margin in the range of 31.75% to 32.75% • Non-GAAP operating margin in the range of 44.75% to 45.75% • GAAP diluted net income per share in the   Normalized numeric aliases: $7.8 billion = 78억 달러; $5.9 billion = 59억 달러; $6.0 billion = 60억 달러; $7.8 = 7.8달러; $5.9 = 5.9달러; $6.0 = 6.0달러; $4.95 = 4.95달러; $5.05 = 5.05달러; $8 = 8달러.

generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
